steps.t: Faratúr can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Faratúr.
Armacar can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Armacar.
Estenan can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Estenan.
Tulcandur can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Tulcandur.
Celuher can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Celuher.
Hallatan can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Hallatan.
Ambassion can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Ambassion.
Ostondil can be found in Díngarth. You should spar with Ostondil.
Hildvar can be found in Díngarth. You should talk to Hildvar.
